Optional audience of the token to be requested from Managed Identity. Default value is "api://AzureADTokenExchange". This value is different on clouds other than Azure Public

Docs.summary: Prototype of certificate-less authentication using a signed assertion acquired with managed identity (certificateless).

MemberSignature.Value: public override System.Threading.Tasks.Task<Microsoft.Identity.Client.ClientSignedAssertion?> GetSignedAssertionWithBindingAsync (Microsoft.Identity.Client.AssertionRequestOptions? assertionRequestOptions, System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

.method public hidebysig virtual instance class System.Threading.Tasks.Task`1<class Microsoft.Identity.Client.ClientSignedAssertion> GetSignedAssertionWithBindingAsync(class Microsoft.Identity.Client.AssertionRequestOptions assertionRequestOptions, valuetype System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken) cil managed

Public Overrides Function GetSignedAssertionWithBindingAsync (assertionRequestOptions As AssertionRequestOptions, Optional cancellationToken As CancellationToken = Nothing) As Task(Of ClientSignedAssertion)

override this.GetSignedAssertionWithBindingAsync : Microsoft.Identity.Client.AssertionRequestOptions * System.Threading.CancellationToken -> System.Threading.Tasks.Task<Microsoft.Identity.Client.ClientSignedAssertion>

Docs.summary: Acquires a managed identity token bound to a binding certificate via mTLS PoP, returning both the assertion and the binding certificate so MSAL can pin the outer confidential client request to the same certificate (FIC + mTLS PoP, two-leg flow).
Docs.remarks: Used when the consuming confidential client has token binding enabled (e.g., AuthorizationHeaderProviderOptions.ProtocolScheme = "MTLS_POP"). Requires MSAL.NET key-attestation support and an Azure VM / Arc-hosted managed identity capable of returning a .

MemberSignature.Value: public override bool SupportsTokenBinding { get; }
.property instance bool SupportsTokenBinding
Public Overrides ReadOnly Property SupportsTokenBinding As Boolean
member this.SupportsTokenBinding : bool

Docs.summary: Returns true: managed identity provides a binding certificate alongside the federated assertion via MSAL's IMDS V2 mTLS PoP flow.
